metadata.creator: Texas Instruments
metadata.description: ROM dump of a TI-84Pplus CE for use with CEmu (not Cemu). files from calculator (8xv) and file used to create them (8xp) also included. The actual ROM file is ROM.rom
metadata.subject: rom; Ti 84 plus ce; ti 84 plus ce dump; dump; ti 84 plus ce rom
metadata.title: TI-84 Plus CE ROM
